issues.description: G1GC humongous allocations cause stuttering with large texture packs
issues.recommendation: Add -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M to reduce humongous allocations
Set -Xmx to at least 4G for modded play
issues.description: Heap too small for modded Minecraft, causes frequent GC and OOM crashes
ZGC is not available on Java 8, causes crash on startup
issues.recommendation: Remove -XX:+UseZGC or upgrade to Java 11+

issues.description: TieredStopAtLevel=1 disables JIT, causes severe performance degradation
issues.recommendation: Remove -XX:TieredStopAtLevel=1

issues.description: No MaxMetaspaceSize set, can cause unbounded memory growth with large modpacks
issues.recommendation: Add -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=512m

issues.description: SerialGC causes major pauses and stuttering in modded Minecraft
issues.recommendation: Switch to G1GC: replace -XX:+UseSerialGC with -XX:+UseG1GC

issues.description: ShenandoahGC on Java 21 with Forge causes rare but reproducible crashes in rendering thread
issues.recommendation: Switch to ZGC or G1GC on Java 21 with Forge

issues.description: Stack size too small, causes StackOverflowError in deeply nested mod code
issues.recommendation: Set -Xss to at least 1M
